title: Swd's 3D-Items
description: Makes Items to be 3D,but faithful to the original.
body:
# The v1.6 has been released!!

# Makes items to be 3D!
## This resource pack is dedicated to transforming the default items of Minecraft into fully realized 3D models,striving to convert a vast majority of items found within the game while maintaining a art style faithful to vanilla Minecraft's charm.
### Needs:
Minecraft 1.21.4+
